name: Baked Ziti and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 cups tomato juice, or vegetable juice
6 ounces mozzarella cheese, part skim milk, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ziti as directed on the label.
2. Cut green peppers, carrots, celery, and onion into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. In a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, heat salad oil. Cook the vegetables until lightly browned.
4. Stir in 1/4 cup water; continue cooking the vegetables over medium heat until they are tender-crisp.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Drain the ziti and set aside.
7. Add the cooked vegetables to the saucepot containing the crushed tomatoes, vegetable juice, sugar, salt, and oregano. Heat over high heat until boiling.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the cooked ziti. Reserve 3/4 cup shredded mozzarella for topping.
9. Stir in Parmesan cheese and remaining mozzarella into the ziti mixture in the saucepot.
10. Spoon the mixture into a shallow 4-quart casserole dish. Sprinkle with reserved mozzarella cheese.
11. Cover the casserole and bake for 30 minutes or until the cheese melts and the mixture is hot and bubbly.
